title: EvidenceLink
description: A reference to an external evidence record (transparency log entry, receipt chain entry, counter-signature, etc.) that is associated with a proof, receipt, or refusal. Protocol version 1.0.0.

type.description: The type of evidence. See protocol/10-evidence-linkage.md.

link_type.description: How the evidence is referenced. 'inline' = the evidence is embedded in the artefact. 'external_url' = the evidence is at the given URL. 'content_hash' = only the hash of the evidence is recorded.

target_ref.description: The reference to the evidence. Shape depends on link_type.

hash.description: Required when link_type is 'content_hash'. Optional for 'external_url' (integrity check).

inline_payload.description: Required when link_type is 'inline'. The evidence payload itself.

issuer_id.description: The identifier of the evidence issuer (e.g. the transparency log operator).
